who: real estate agents managing 5–15 property listings/month
offer: For real estate agents processing 5–15 property listings/month, inefficient management causes missed opportunities. We streamline property listing management instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Inefficient management of property listings leads to missed opportunities and late updates.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where real estate agents seek advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 real estate agents with demo video
Participate in community forums for real estate tools
try_it: Let users try simple property listing input form and basic reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
